Record Class Clan

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
net.sylphian.minecraft.clans.model.Clan
Record Components:
clanId - the clan's unique identifier
name - the clan's display name (unique across all clans)
members - all current members, including the leader
motd - message of the day, or null if none is set
createdAt - when the clan was founded
public record Clan(UUID clanId, String name, List<ClanMember> members, String motd, Instant createdAt) extends Record
An immutable snapshot of a clan and its membership at a point in time.

Derived state (leader UUID, member lookups, permission checks) is computed from the members list rather than stored separately, keeping the record self-consistent.

  • Constructor Details

    • Clan

      public Clan(UUID clanId, String name, List<ClanMember> members, String motd, Instant createdAt)
      Creates an instance of a Clan record class.
      Parameters:
      clanId - the value for the clanId record component
      name - the value for the name record component
      members - the value for the members record component
      motd - the value for the motd record component
      createdAt - the value for the createdAt record component

  • Method Details

    • getMember

      public Optional<ClanMember> getMember(UUID playerUuid)
      Returns the member record for the given player, if they are in this clan.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the player to look up
      Returns:
      the member record, or empty if the player is not a member

    • isMember

      public boolean isMember(UUID playerUuid)
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the player to test
      Returns:
      true if the player is a member of this clan

    • leaderId

      public Optional<UUID> leaderId()
      Returns the UUID of the clan's leader.
      Returns:
      the leader's UUID, or empty if the clan has no leader (should not occur in practice)

    • hasPermission

      public boolean hasPermission(UUID playerUuid, ClanPermission permission)
      Checks whether the given player holds a permission, either directly or by virtue of being the LEADER.
      Parameters:
      playerUuid - the player to test
      permission - the permission to check
      Returns:
      true if the player is a member and holds the permission (or is LEADER)

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
